_doc: Furnishability scoring rules. Defines which room types are evaluated by the furnishability surrogate model. Rooms marked scored=false receive null and are excluded from the apartment aggregate.

room_rules._doc: Keys are room_type strings. 'scored': true = evaluated by the CNN/LightGBM surrogate model; false = excluded (null score, not counted in aggregate).

Hallway._doc: Not scored — hallways are not furnished. Excluded from aggregate.

aggregate._doc: How to aggregate per-room surrogate predictions into a single furnishability score. 'mean' = arithmetic mean of scored rooms only (rooms with scored=false are excluded).
